question: [File: 'File Name: monitor/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/monitor/subscribe/MirrorSubscriber.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: onPublish(PublishResponse response)] Can an unprivileged external user inject a crafted PublishResponse with a forged TransactionId into the onPublish() pipeline, given that the default implementation is a no-op and CompositeSubscriber blindly forwards to all subscribers, causing the monitor to record fabricated Hashgraph transaction history?

[File: 'File Name: monitor/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/monitor/subscribe/MirrorSubscriber.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: subscribe()] Can an unprivileged external user position a rogue mirror node at the configured gRPC endpoint so that subscribe() receives tampered TopicMessage streams, causing the monitor to accept falsified Hashgraph consensus history without any cryptographic verification?

[File: 'File Name: monitor/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/monitor/subscribe/MirrorSubscriber.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: getSubscriptions()] Can an unprivileged external user call GET /api/v1/subscriber with crafted protocol and status query parameters to filter and identify which Hashgraph topic subscriptions are active, then replay old topic messages to those specific subscriptions to manipulate the monitor's perceived Hashgraph history?

[File: 'File Name: monitor/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/monitor/subscribe/MirrorSubscriber.java -> Scope: Critical: Any impact caused by Tampering/Manipulating Hashgraph history'] [Function: subscribe()] Can an unprivileged external user exploit the absence of message authentication in the Flux<SubscribeResponse> pipeline returned by subscribe() to replay previously observed SubscribeResponse objects with old consensusTimestamp values, causing the monitor to believe historical Hashgraph events are current?
